name: United States
summary: Day 68 Wednesday. **PROJECT FREEDOM PAUSED MAY 5 — TRUMP TRUTH SOCIAL: 'GREAT PROGRESS' TOWARD 'COMPLETE AND FINAL AGREEMENT' VIA PAKISTAN.** Within 24 hours of launching the named convoy operation (Mon May 4) and within 12 hours of the kinetic exchange (sank 6 Iranian fast boats, intercepted multi-axis Iran strike), Trump announced the operation 'paused for a short period of time' pending final agreement. Pentagon backbone confirmed: Hegseth + Caine reaffirmed ceasefire intact, Iran's actions 'fall below the threshold of restarting major combat operations.' Trump's Truth Social explicitly preserved the underlying blockade ('blockade will remain in full force and effect') — pause is on the US convoy operation, NOT on Iran's closure of Hormuz. Structural read: Project Freedom was leverage, not commitment — once Iran fired and Pakistan re-engaged, Trump used the cover to return to the Pakistan track on US-favorable terms. Branch re-pricing: kinetic ~25-30% (DOWN from 40-45%); negotiated-resolution ~30-35% (UP from 15-20%). Markets: S&P +0.55% Tuesday recovering Mon -0.41% loss; Brent -4% to $109.87 (May 5) → $107.96 (May 6); VIX -5% to 17.38 (BELOW pre-May 4 baseline); USD/INR pulled back to ₹95.13 from ₹95.36 record. The Russia uranium-custodian track is officially sidelined — Kremlin's Peskov clarified May 5 the offer is 'not currently on the negotiating table'; Pakistan track is primary. Sadjadpour framework: 'between cold and hot war' — May 4 kinetic + May 5 pause is the OPERATING EQUILIBRIUM, not a one-off. New trigger watching: pause holds 7+ days without further kinetic exchange (test by May 12).

Confirmed Russia uranium-custodian framework agreed by US + Iran within 21 days (by 2026-05-18)
Third US enforcement action against Iran-linked shipping outside Middle East area within 14 days (Tifani+1)
